title: Aletes longiloba
taxonomy: Aletes longiloba is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is native to the western United States, particularly in the mountainous regions of Oregon and California. The classification of Aletes longiloba includes its kingdom, phylum, and class, which are Plantae, Magnoliophyta, and Magnoliopsida, respectively. The order and family are Apiales and Apiaceae, respectively. Aletes longiloba is also commonly known as Western Aletes or Long-leaved Aletes.
